summary: Completed frontend testing of MyLunaPark app. Found critical Firebase configuration issue preventing authentication, but routing and UI components work correctly.

critical_bugs.impact: Blocks all user registration and login functionality
critical_bugs.error_details: Firebase: Error (auth/configuration-not-found) when attempting user registration

integration_issues.issue: Firebase Auth integration failing due to configuration
integration_issues.symptoms: Registration form submits but fails with Firebase error

passed_tests: Home page loads correctly with hero logo and search bar
Navigation between pages works (Home to Login)
Login page displays email/password fields correctly
Registration mode toggle works - shows name field and role selection
All role selection buttons present (User, Organizer, Gestore Giostre)
Protected routes correctly redirect to login when not authenticated (/favorites, /profile, /admin, /organizer, /ride-owner)
Search input functionality works on home page
UI components render correctly with proper styling
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix Firebase configuration issue. The Firebase project 'mylunaparkgenspark' appears to have configuration problems. Verify Firebase project setup, API keys, and authentication configuration. Error: auth/configuration-not-found suggests the Firebase project may not be properly initialized or the API keys are incorrect.
